case_title: CHARANITA BANKS VS. DENISE LASHA JOHNSON

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, March 23, 2016, in Department 525:
Charanita Banks, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Denise Lasha Johnson, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witness Derisha Johnson, sister.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Ms. Banks testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Endorsed Filed Civil Restraining Order

Appellant/Defendant, Ms. Johnson testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - 3/18/2016 Denise Johnson's continuance request letter, 3/18/2015 letter of Bayview/Hunters Point Community Legal letter.

Derisha Johnson, witness, testifies on behalf of Denise L. Johnson and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Ms. Johnson's evidence retained by the Court and Ms. Banks evidence returned back to her.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Judgment Entered
